beats.narration: Nearly every flaw a pipe mill makes runs along the pipe's length. That one fact drives the whole examination.

payload.title: PIPE & TUBE
payload.sub: Why the beam chases the circumference.

beats.narration: Seamless pipe, pierced from a billet, spirals its laps. E R W forges strip edges — cold weld, hook cracks. Submerged arc: slag plus laminations.
Those flaws stand broadside to a shear wave chasing the circumference. The beam vees through the wall: inside notch at half-vee, outside at full-vee.

payload.heading: Shear wave around the circumference
payload.note: ID NOTCH AT HALF-V · OD NOTCH AT FULL-V

beats.narration: Standardize on notches in matching pipe, five percent of wall. Equalize and mark both. Scan both ways. At notch level: reject or investigate.

chips.t: At notch level? Reject or investigate

beats.narration: So: around the circumference for longitudinal flaws, along the axis for transverse, and the notch sets the yardstick. That's pipe testing in one breath.

payload.sub: That's pipe testing in one breath.
